name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: Benbrook's First Cash Pawn at 9023 Benbrook Blvd offers same-day cash loans on jewelry, electronics, tools, and valuables with extended evening hours.
description_long:
First Cash Pawn operates at 9023 Benbrook Blvd in Benbrook, serving customers who need quick cash without credit checks. This standalone location features easy parking and access from the main boulevard in central Benbrook. Hours are Monday–Friday 10 AM–7 PM, Saturday 10 AM–6 PM, and closed Sundays—convenient for residents to visit weekday evenings or Saturday mornings.

At this Benbrook location, you can pawn jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, and other valuables for immediate cash. The team provides fair appraisals, flexible loan terms, and typically completes transactions the same day. Call 817-249-4909 to ask about current rates, specific items, or to confirm availability before visiting.

If you need fast cash in Benbrook, TX without a credit check, bring a valid ID and the item you want to pawn. First Cash Pawn is a straightforward alternative to payday loans or credit cards for short-term cash needs. Open during convenient hours most days of the week for local residents.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America provide exceptional accessibility and convenience
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no debt collection or credit reporting if you don't repay—you simply lose the item
Instant cash on-the-spot for merchandise and gold sales with no approval process or credit check
Wide range of acceptable collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances) accepted at all locations
Layaway service available with only 10% down payment, offering alternative to traditional financing
AFF subsidiary provides lease-to-own options through 15,000+ retail partner locations nationally
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) provides financial stability and regulatory oversight
cons: Specific interest rates, loan terms, and repayment periods not disclosed on website, making cost comparison difficult
Pawn loans result in permanent loss of collateral if unpaid—no opportunity to recover items after default
Limited transparency about what constitutes 'small' loans or typical loan amounts available
Collateral-based lending means lower-income consumers may risk losing essential personal property
No information provided about appeal processes, dispute resolution, or consumer protections beyond standard privacy policy
best_for: Cash-constrained consumers needing emergency funds without credit checks or debt obligations
Individuals with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they can temporarily pledge for short-term loans
People seeking to buy discounted merchandise, since pawn shops resell pledged items below retail
Consumers in areas with limited access to traditional banking or alternative lending options
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for individuals with immediate cash needs and valuable collateral who lack access to traditional credit or prefer to avoid debt obligations. The critical caveat is that pledged items are permanently forfeited if the loan is not repaid—this should only be used for non-essential items or as a true emergency measure, and borrowers should fully understand the cost structure and repayment timeline before pledging property.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (non-recourse)
Retail sales of new and pledged merchandise
Gold and precious metal buying for immediate cash
Layaway plans with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own financing through AFF subsidiary network
Retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partners
Store locator and inventory search tools
Jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instrument sales
Point-of-sale payment solutions through technology platform
meta_description: Benbrook, TX – First Cash Pawn at 9023 Benbrook Blvd. Same-day pawn loans on jewelry, tools, and electronics with extended hours.
